name: year offset range no duplicate base years
description: Verifies that year_offset range columns do not expand base_years and do not produce a redundant LEFT JOIN when no WHERE filter exists on the offset column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2024]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('RB')), "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", COUNT(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as rush_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)), "t15799778fa87e145f39f74086b9716ea" as (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", COUNT(CASE WHEN bc_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) as rush_atts_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "player"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."rush_atts_from_plays" AS "rush_atts_from_plays_0", (SELECT SUM(t15799778fa87e145f39f74086b9716ea.rush_atts_from_plays) FROM t15799778fa87e145f39f74086b9716ea WHERE t15799778fa87e145f39f74086b9716ea.pid = player.pid AND t15799778fa87e145f39f74086b9716ea.year BETWEEN player_years.year + 1 AND player_years.year + 30) AS "rush_atts_from_plays_1", "player_years"."year", "player"."pos" from "player" inner join "player_years" on "player_years"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec" on "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."year" = 2024 where player.pos IN ('RB') group by player.fname, player.lname, "ta558dd0535371dc6c6f6ee436d18bbec"."rush_atts_from_plays", "player_years"."year", "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
